title: Refined Vanilla
description: Enjoy Minecraft with higher performance while having visual improvements.
body:
**Description:**

Enjoy Minecraft with higher performance while having visual improvements. You'll notice the creatures have new animations, water has a sway, added particles, and more. Not only that, you'll be able to play more simply by having descriptions under enchantments, easy inventory access, and general in-game fixes. This pack can be seen as a base for others, with everything being client-based.

**Visual Features:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- [Ambient Environment](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambient-environment)
- [Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)
- [Chunks fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in)
- [Entity View Distance](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-view-distance/version/1.6.0+1.21.9)
- [Explosive Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
- [Glowtone](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowtone/version/1.0-mc1.21.9)
- [Punchy](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa)
- [Natural Waters](https://modrinth.com/mod/natural-waters/version/21.10.0)
- [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular)
- [Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised)

</details>
